page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 64 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores operating at a baseline frequency of 2.9 GHz. The processor architecture allocates exactly one thread per core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, which translates to a resource density of 4.0 GB of memory per CPU core.

This server features a dense GPU configuration consisting of eight NVIDIA A10 graphics processing units, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. It does not include any local storage, meaning all operating system and application data must reside on network-attached storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

The hardware profile represents a high-density GPU resource allocation, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that scale across multiple graphics processors rather than relying on local disk I/O. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for network storage latency. The dedicated core model ensures consistent CPU performance. Suitable workloads include GPU-accelerated tasks such as machine learning inference, parallel compute jobs, and graphics rendering.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.16xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 64 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B CPU cores running at 2.9 GHz with one thread per core. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The primary hardware feature is the inclusion of eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, which provide a total of 192 GB of VRAM. This server does not contain local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation and high GPU density make this instance suitable for multi-GPU parallel processing, machine learning workloads, and intensive graphics rendering tasks where local storage is not a primary requirement.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.16xlarge is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-8x.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An accelerator-focused server featuring eight dedicated GPUs, sixty-four physical CPU cores, and high-speed network connectivity for parallel computing.
bullet_points: Eight integrated NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing 192 GB of total VRAM
Sixty-four dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores with one thread per core
Two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of system memory
Thirty-two gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage configurations
Designed for machine learning, parallel processing, and graphics rendering
